findings.evidence: `Action.lean:156-163` proves only the fixing and boundary cases via `⟨fun f => f.1.continuous⟩`; `Topology/Algebra/HomeomorphAction.lean:56` has the analogous theorem at the natural level for every subgroup.
findings.fix: Replace these with a generic instance `Diffeomorph.applySubgroupContinuousConstSMul (H : Subgroup (Diff I M n)) : ContinuousConstSMul H M`, matching `TauCeti.Homeomorph.applySubgroupContinuousConstSMul`, and let fixing/relBoundary inherit it.
findings.issue: `fixing.applyContinuousConstSMul` and the derived `relBoundary.applyContinuousConstSMul` are special cases of continuity for any subgroup of `Diff I M n`; the proof uses only `f.1.continuous`, not the fixing property.

findings.evidence: `Action.lean:130-135` repeats `fixing I M n s = fixingSubgroup (Diff I M n) s`; `Action.lean:144-147` repeats `relBoundary I M n = fixing I M n (I.boundary M)`.
findings.fix: Keep one name per statement, preferably the `_def` simp/unfolding lemmas, and remove the redundant aliases unless a downstream use requires one.
findings.issue: The file exposes duplicate definitional lemmas: `fixing_def` and `fixing_eq_fixingSubgroup` have identical statements, as do `relBoundary_def` and `relBoundary_eq_fixing`.

summary: The PR adds the intended action at a reasonable level, but two API pieces are narrower or more duplicated than the surrounding library pattern supports.
